results.name: E-1 未登录访问发布页跳 login
E-2 登录后访问发布页
E-3 AI 模式 debounce 触发 (有大白话输入)
E-4 跳过 AI 跳手动模式
E-5 API POST /api/v1/posts 创建帖子 (或 rate limit)
results.detail: status=429, body={"code":429,"message":"新注册用户 24h 内最多发布 1 条信息，请明天再试","data":null,"error":"Internal Server Error","path":"/api/v1/posts","timestamp":"2026-06-19T10:49:05.713Z"}

results.name: E-6 缺 title 返回 400
results.detail: status=400, body={"code":400,"message":["title must be longer than or equal to 1 characters","title must be a string"
